banner: Available now on the App Store — spot ultra-processed food in seconds

hero.title: Scan. Avoid Ultra-Processed.
hero.subtitle: NutriSwap helps you fight industrial foods — scan any barcode to see NOVA processing, seed oils, additives, and what to avoid, then find better alternatives.

howItWorks.title: How NutriSwap Works
howItWorks.step1Desc: Hold your phone over any product barcode — it takes less than a second.
howItWorks.step2Desc: See your NutriSwap score, nutrition breakdown, ingredients, and personalized alerts.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Discover healthier alternatives you can buy right away.

features.title: Everything you get after one scan
features.scoreDesc: A clear 0–100 rating so you instantly know if a product is excellent, good, limit, or avoid.
features.breakdownDesc: Seed oils, processing profile, added sugars, additives, nutrition, and eco score — all in one view.
features.alertsDesc: Get warned about allergens, seed oils, additives, and heavy metals based on your preferences.
features.ingredientsDesc: Tap any ingredient to learn what it is, why it matters, and what effects it may have.
features.alternativesDesc: See catalog alternatives with higher scores — available at stores near you.

why.title: Why NutriSwap Makes Shopping Easier

upfBox.title: Spot ultra-processed food before it hits your cart
upfBox.subtitle: Every scan shows how processed a product really is — and flags the seed oils, sweeteners, and additives worth avoiding.

items.question: How does the barcode scanner work?
items.answer: Simply point your phone camera at any product barcode. NutriSwap looks it up and shows your score, breakdown, ingredients, and alerts in seconds.

items.question: What's a NutriSwap score?
items.answer: Your NutriSwap score rates products on a 0–100 scale based on processing, ingredients, nutrition, and more. Excellent, Good, Limit, or Avoid — so you know instantly.

items.question: What does the breakdown show?
items.answer: After each scan you see seed oils, processing profile (NOVA), added or synthetic sugars, additives, nutrition details, and eco score.

items.question: Can I get alerts for allergens and additives?
items.answer: Yes. Set your preferences and NutriSwap warns you about allergens, seed oils, additives, and heavy metals on every scan.

items.question: Does NutriSwap suggest better products?
items.answer: Yes. When a product scores low, NutriSwap shows better catalog alternatives you can buy instead.

items.question: Where does the product data come from?
items.answer: We use Open Food Facts and trusted nutrition databases, combined with NutriSwap's own analysis.

items.question: Can I search manually if scanning doesn't work?
items.answer: Yes. You can type a product name or barcode number to look it up manually.

items.question: Is NutriSwap free?
items.answer: You can start with a free trial to scan and explore. A subscription unlocks full access, personalized insights, and ad-free browsing.

getPage.title: The app to eat better.
getPage.step1: Tap the menu in the top right corner of the app.
